bead.title: S15-7a: ADR-conformance lint for mutation resolvers (requireTrusted + CSRF/Origin)
bead.description: Add a CI-enforced static lint over GraphQL mutation resolvers in cli/internal/server/graphql that flags any resolver missing the requireTrusted gate (the route-level wrapper) or omitting CSRF/Origin checks for prompt-driven endpoints. Lint runs as a Go test (go test ./cli/internal/server/graphql -run TestADRMutationConformance) so it is wired into the existing CI test suite without new tooling. Detection should walk the schema.graphql Mutation type and confirm: (a) the /graphql HTTP route is wrapped in requireTrusted (verified by reading server.go); (b) each resolver function for a mutation that takes operator/prompt-style input invokes the CSRF/Origin check helper (e.g. validateCSRF / Origin header check). Allowlist exceptions explicitly. See /tmp/story-15-final.md §Tests 'ADR conformance test' and §Risks 'Multi-node authorization gap'. Parent: ddx-256af8b5.
bead.acceptance: Test TestADRMutationConformance exists under cli/internal/server/graphql; it passes today and would fail if a new mutation resolver were added without a requireTrusted route wrap or, for prompt-driven mutations, without a CSRF/Origin check; passing the test is part of the existing 'go test ./...' CI run (no new pipeline step); a deliberate negative-case sub-test demonstrates the lint rejects a synthetic non-conformant resolver definition.

{"rationale":"The bead has explicit parent/deps, a named `TestADRMutationConformance`, the required `go test` and `lefthook` gates, and enough implementation intent for a resolver-lint task. It still misses the rubric on title form, structured description with file:line-grounded current state/root cause and non-scope, and an `area:*` label; it also relies on `/tmp/story-15-final.md` instead of embedding durable context.","score":5,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative subsystem-scoped change, e.g. `graphql: add ADR-conformance lint for mutation resolvers`.","Reformat the description into PROBLEM / ROOT CAUSE or CURRENT STATE / PROPOSED FIX / NON-SCOPE, cite the relevant `cli/internal/server/graphql` file:line(s), and inline the needed test/risk excerpt instead of referencing `/tmp/story-15-final.md`.","Add an `area:graphql` (or equivalent server/graphql area) label so the bead includes phase, area, kind, and cross-ref facets.","Enumerate the explicit allowlist exceptions in the bead body, with the specific resolver names or files they apply to."],"waivers_applied":[]}
